scripts.dev: pnpm exec concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @gamejam/server dev" "pnpm --filter @gamejam/client dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @gamejam/shared build && pnpm --filter @gamejam/client build && pnpm --filter @gamejam/server build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @gamejam/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @gamejam/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @gamejam/client typecheck
